summary: Well-organized Pester test suite with good coverage of core matrix generation features (cartesian products, include/exclude rules, max-parallel, fail-fast, JSON output). Test contexts are clean and test names are descriptive. However, rigor is limited: only one error scenario tested (matrix size exceeded) with no error message validation; missing edge cases like null values, duplicates, boundary conditions (exactly at max size, maxParallel=0), and what happens when excludes remove all combinations. Design is solid but lacks parameterized tests (Pester supports @() syntax) and no setup/teardown for common fixtures. No verification that output matches actual GitHub Actions matrix format expectations. Module import could fail silently. Would catch regressions in happy path but gaps in error handling and corner case coverage reduce confidence.
